groups.label: Where It Started
groups.description: Selected work from my development journey, from browser games to full-stack applications. These projects were built during the General Assembly Web Development Immersive, where I got my start in web development.

projects.title: Minesweeper
projects.summary: A browser-based recreation of the classic Minesweeper game, built with vanilla JavaScript.

projects.title: PubReviewer
projects.summary: Full-stack pub review application with user accounts, letting visitors rate and discover local pubs.

projects.title: Plan Your Night
projects.summary: Group MEAN-stack project for planning nights out, integrating Google Places and Skiddle APIs.

projects.title: Developers Code Shop
projects.summary: Final bootcamp MERN-stack e-commerce project for developer merchandise, with authentication and testing.
